tagline: Stop Overpaying for Coverage You Don't Understand
hero_subtitle: Glenview Insurance Partners delivers personalized insurance solutions for families and businesses across the North Shore. Local expertise, independent options, and real people who pick up the phone.
service_area_description: Serving Glenview, Northbrook, Wilmette, Winnetka, and the greater North Shore area.
seo_title: Glenview Insurance Partners | Insurance Agency in Glenview, IL
seo_description: Glenview Insurance Partners provides personalized home, auto, business, and life insurance solutions for families and businesses across the North Shore.
about_heading: Independent Insurance Built on Local Trust
services_subtitle: Full-service insurance coverage for every stage of life and business.
reviews_subtitle: Families and businesses across Glenview trust us to protect what matters most.
cta_heading: Get a free insurance review. See what you're missing.
cta_subtitle: Book a no-pressure consultation and we'll audit your current coverage for gaps and savings.
footer_description: Independent insurance agency serving Glenview and the North Shore with personalized coverage solutions.

services_featured.name: Home Insurance
services_featured.description: Protect your most valuable asset with comprehensive homeowners coverage tailored to North Shore properties.

services_featured.name: Business Insurance
services_featured.description: Custom commercial packages that protect your livelihood — from general liability to workers' comp and beyond.

services_secondary.name: Auto Insurance
services_secondary.description: Competitive rates from multiple carriers so you get the right coverage without the sticker shock.

services_secondary.name: Life Insurance
services_secondary.description: Term and whole life policies that give your family a financial safety net when it matters most.

services_accent.name: Umbrella Insurance
services_accent.description: Extra liability protection that kicks in when your other policies max out. Essential for high-value households.

services_wide.name: Commercial Property Insurance
services_wide.description: Safeguard your business location, equipment, and inventory against fire, theft, and natural disasters.

about_features.title: Independent & Unbiased
about_features.description: We shop dozens of carriers to find you the best coverage at the best price — no corporate quotas.

about_features.title: Locally Rooted
about_features.description: Based in Glenview and serving the North Shore community with real, face-to-face relationships.

about_features.title: Claims Advocacy
about_features.description: When you file a claim, we fight for you — not the insurance company. That's the independent advantage.

reviews.name: Jennifer R.
reviews.text: They saved us over $1,200 a year by shopping our home and auto together. Should have switched years ago.

reviews.name: Mark & Lisa T.
reviews.text: When a pipe burst in our basement, they walked us through every step of the claim. True advocates.

reviews.name: Steve D.
reviews.text: Finally an insurance agent who explains things in plain English and actually returns phone calls.
